title: Toledo Economic Development Dashboard
watch_list: Toledo City Council vote on the $5 vehicle registration fee — procedural deadline May 26 to start the new rate for the 2027 registration year. A 'no' vote forces 2027 SCMR-fund cuts and weakens the site-readiness narrative.

The Blade Superior Street property disposition. Block Communications has not announced a timeline, destination, or property plan. Watch for a public listing, a TCIC engagement, or a mothballed-property scenario — that will set the comparable for adjacent owners.

Watershed Weekend June 11–14 — 20 days out. Programming is largely set; watch for business-district tie-ins from Vistula, Warehouse District, and East Toledo operators who want the halfway-point visibility moment.
Vibrancy 19 property list — still not published in full. Cluster patterns by Legacy Commercial Corridor are the signal. Any Vistula awards would accelerate Ostrich Towne's next leasing wave.
State $1B sports facility fund award timing. When Ohio names recipients, Summit Street Sports' $83.6M stadium either moves to budgeted or gets re-cut.
CuriosiTEA Emporium opening date at Ostrich Towne. With Riverside BBQ confirmed open, CuriosiTEA is now the make-or-break fourth tenant for the district's summer thesis.
Former Health District building disposition. $571K in demo funding is confirmed — watch for an RFP or TCIC Shovel Ready Sites designation on the cleared 1.8-acre downtown parcel.
Hotel Lorraine 72-hour facade deadline has lapsed (issued May 19). Watch for fines filed, an emergency demolition order, or movement on the sheriff's sale calendar.
Innovation Post lease specifics — square-foot allocations among Wurtec, WorkSpring, Junior Achievement of NW Ohio, and SEGULA, and day-one employee counts.
TCIC Shovel Ready Sites Fund — first site acquisition. 1400 N. Summit is the named target; watch for the RFP or board authorization on the actual land purchase and timeline.
Old South End housing pilot outcomes. The $1M initial tranche is live; watch for David Mann and the Land Bank to announce first RISE-designated properties entering the rehab pipeline.

Dorr Street duplex developer identity — the 32-lot Inverness Village applicant wasn't named at Plan Commission. Their track record will signal whether this is a one-off or a duplex-build cycle leading edge.

EVIS America 2026 (Nov 3–5, Glass City Center) — speaker announcements and exhibitor/sponsor list will signal which OEMs and mobility investors are being drawn into Toledo's orbit ahead of the summit.
RGP data-center pipeline — Gary Thompson has been working this sector for four years. Any hyperscale site announcement in the 17-county footprint would be the biggest RGP win since Meta.
